'''fohahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:loafered|loafered]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-h-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loafered|loafered]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fohahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fohahithi|fohahithi]] || [[word:fohahiji|fohahiji]] || [[word:fohahishi|fohahishi]] || [[word:fohahiki|fohahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fohahuthuthu|fohahuthuthu]] || [[word:fohahujuju|fohahujuju]] || [[word:fohahushushu|fohahushushu]] || [[word:fohahukuku|fohahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fohahuthu|fohahuthu]] || [[word:fohahuju|fohahuju]] || [[word:fohahushu|fohahushu]] || [[word:fohahuku|fohahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fohahufthuf|fohahufthuf]] || [[word:fohahufjuf|fohahufjuf]] || [[word:fohahufshuf|fohahufshuf]] || [[word:fohahufkuf|fohahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fohahethe|fohahethe]] || [[word:fohaheje|fohaheje]] || [[word:fohaheshe|fohaheshe]] || [[word:fohaheke|fohaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fohahothotho|fohahothotho]] || [[word:fohahojojo|fohahojojo]] || [[word:fohahoshosho|fohahoshosho]] || [[word:fohahokoko|fohahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fohahotho|fohahotho]] || [[word:fohahojo|fohahojo]] || [[word:fohahosho|fohahosho]] || [[word:fohahoko|fohahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fohahofthof|fohahofthof]] || [[word:fohahofjof|fohahofjof]] || [[word:fohahofshof|fohahofshof]] || [[word:fohahofkof|fohahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fohahÃŸfthÃŸf|fohahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fohahÃŸfjÃŸf|fohahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fohahÃŸfshÃŸf|fohahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fohahÃŸfkÃŸf|fohahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fohahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|fohahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fohahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|fohahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fohahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|fohahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fohahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|fohahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fohahÃŸfthÃŸf|fohahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fohahÃŸfjÃŸf|fohahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fohahÃŸfshÃŸf|fohahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fohahÃŸfkÃŸf|fohahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fohahÃŸfthÃŸf|fohahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fohahÃŸfjÃŸf|fohahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fohahÃŸfshÃŸf|fohahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fohahÃŸfkÃŸf|fohahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fohahÃḊthÃḊ|fohahÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:fohahÃḊjÃḊ|fohahÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:fohahÃḊshÃḊ|fohahÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:fohahÃḊkÃḊ|fohahÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fohahathatha|fohahathatha]] || [[word:fohahajaja|fohahajaja]] || [[word:fohahashasha|fohahashasha]] || [[word:fohahakaka|fohahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fohahatha|fohahatha]] || [[word:fohahaja|fohahaja]] || [[word:fohahasha|fohahasha]] || [[word:fohahaka|fohahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fohahafthaf|fohahafthaf]] || [[word:fohahafjaf|fohahafjaf]] || [[word:fohahafshaf|fohahafshaf]] || [[word:fohahafkaf|fohahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fohahasha|fohahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fohahshÃḋsha|fohahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fohahrosha|fohahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fohahmusha|fohahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fohahyasha|fohahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofohahnkshÃḋsha|gofohahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofohahnkrosha|gofohahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofohahnkmusha|gofohahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofohahnkyasha|gofohahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fohahahasha|fohahahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fohahahshÃḋsha|fohahahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fohahahrosha|fohahahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fohahahmusha|fohahahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fohahahyasha|fohahahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofohahahnkshÃḋsha|gofohahahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofohahahnkrosha|gofohahahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofohahahnkmusha|gofohahahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofohahahnkyasha|gofohahahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fehÃḊhasha|fehÃḊhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fehÃḊhshÃḋsha|fehÃḊhshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fehÃḊhrosha|fehÃḊhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fehÃḊhmusha|fehÃḊhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fehÃḊhyasha|fehÃḊhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofehÃḊhnkshÃḋsha|gofehÃḊhnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofehÃḊhnkrosha|gofehÃḊhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofehÃḊhnkmusha|gofehÃḊhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofehÃḊhnkyasha|gofehÃḊhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fohfahasha|fohfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fohfahshÃḋsha|fohfahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fohfahrosha|fohfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fohfahmusha|fohfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fohfahyasha|fohfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofohfahnkshÃḋsha|gofohfahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofohfahnkrosha|gofohfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofohfahnkmusha|gofohfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofohfahnkyasha|gofohfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
